'''Shoribus''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kabal/Legends|Kabal]].

The [[Kabal Central Citadel]] in Shoribus was damaged by protestors during the riots of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].

{{City-stub}}
